/* September 11 */Fixes and tagging deprecated sources ([[Wikipedia:Reliable sources/Perennial sources]])
/* United States designates IRGC as foreign terrorist organization */

Although Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) was designated as foreign terrorist organization by the United States in April 2019, this Wikipedia article showed the designation was made in 2007. What's more, the links to the citations was invalid. So, I replaced the paragraph and added 'sub-heading 1' under which I corrected the information and added citations from Reuters, which is certainly a valid and credible source.
